blurry.positive: soft blurry image, defocused, smooth edges, shallow indistinct details
blurry.negative: crisp sharp image, tack sharp details, clear edges

contrast.positive: high contrast image, strong blacks and bright highlights, punchy tonal separation
contrast.negative: low contrast image, flat lighting, muted tonal separation

saturation.positive: vibrant saturated colors, rich color intensity, vivid palette
saturation.negative: desaturated muted colors, restrained color intensity, subdued palette

warmth.positive: warm color temperature, golden light, amber highlights, red and orange balance
warmth.negative: cool color temperature, blue cast, crisp cyan shadows

sharpness.positive: sharp detailed image, crisp fine detail, clear edges, high microcontrast
sharpness.negative: soft image, blurred details, hazy edges
